title: 并行 tool call 不生效 → 检查 tool_result 的发送方式
title_en: Parallel Tool Calls Don't Work → Check tool_result Message Format

body.problem: 你希望 Claude 并行调用多个工具以提升效率，但它始终一个接一个地串行调用。或者你设置了 disable_parallel_tool_use 但似乎没有效果。
body.solution: (1) 串行而非并行：问题出在你返回 tool_result 的方式。必须把多个 tool_result block 放在同一条 user message 里发送，而不是每个结果各发一条消息。如果你分成多条消息发，Claude 会把每次返回当成一个新「回合」，自然就变成了串行。(2) disable_parallel_tool_use 无效：这个参数必须在会返回 tool_use 的那次请求中设置。如果你在后续请求才加，它对之前已经返回的 tool call 没有任何影响。
body.keyTakeaway: 并行 tool use 的关键：多个 tool_result 要在同一条 user message 里返回，不要拆成多条消息。

body_en.problem: You want Claude to call multiple tools in parallel for efficiency, but it always calls them sequentially. Or you set disable_parallel_tool_use but it seems ignored.
body_en.solution: (1) Sequential instead of parallel: the issue is how you return tool_results. You must send multiple tool_result blocks in ONE user message, not one per turn. If you split them into separate messages, Claude treats each return as a new 'turn' and naturally serializes. (2) disable_parallel_tool_use ignored: this parameter must be set on the request that returns tool_use. Setting it on a later request has no effect on earlier tool calls.
body_en.keyTakeaway: The key to parallel tool use: return multiple tool_results in a single user message — don't split them across turns.
